title: sphertt: hyperspherical reservoir computing with tensor-train connectivity
description: Pure-NumPy library for hyperspherical reservoir computing with tensor-train (TT) connectivity and native TT state evolution. Implements the quasi-orthogonal connectivity family W(beta), the truncation-error amplification law diagnostics (g_bar, delta_bar), and the TT-state reservoir engine that sustains memory capacity at state dimensions beyond 10^9 with sub-megabyte models.
